n: Flux - Movies, Shows & Anime local player
s: Modern local video player and library for your movies, shows, and anime.
d:
Flux is a modern and elegant video player designed to transform your local files into an immersive library.

Why choose Flux?

  • Organized Library: Information for your movies, series, and anime is retrieved via the TMDB service, allowing them to be organized into a simple and efficient library.
  • A Modern Interface: Enjoy the combination of Material 3 Expressive and Material You for an application with a modern design.
  • Integrated Player: In addition to being a beautiful library, you can play your files directly from within the application.
  • Totally Free: No subscriptions, no ads, no trackers. This application is completely free and will remain so.

Whether you are an anime fan, a cinephile, or simply need an application to play your files, Flux will make you want to keep watching your movies and series.

Note: Flux is an Open Source project developed by an Android enthusiast committed to providing a pleasant, simple, and high-performance experience.
